TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Amis, story: Amis_Nr-crab_panay
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: ira ku ccay a matu'asay tayra i alo' mi ala tunini u kaka'enen tu tatangtangen a kaka'enen.
S.PHON: ira ku ʦʦaj a matuʡasaj tajra i aɾo~uʡ mi aɾa tunini u kakaʡənən tu tataŋtaŋən a kakaʡənən.
S.FORM: ira ku ccay a matu'asay tayra i alo' mi ala tunini u kaka'enen tu tatangtangen a kaka'enen.
S.PHON: ira ku ʦʦaj a matuʡasaj tajra i aɾo~uʡ mi aɾa tunini u kakaʡənən tu tataŋtaŋən a kakaʡənən.
S.TRANSL: 有一個老人家去溪邊找吃的,打算煮來吃.
There was an old man going to the river to look for something to cook and eat.

S.FORM: yo tahira cingra i alo'.
S.PHON: jo~u taħira ʦiŋra i aɾo~uʡ.
S.FORM: yo tahira cingra i alo'.
S.PHON: jo~u taħira ʦiŋra i aɾo~uʡ.

S.FORM: mifuhad cingra tu fekeloh.
S.PHON: mifuħaɬ~ɮ ʦiŋra tu fəkəɾo~uħ.
S.FORM: mifuhad cingra tu fekeloh.
S.PHON: mifuħaɬ~ɮ ʦiŋra tu fəkəɾo~uħ.

S.FORM: matama nira kunini u ccay a fawu.
S.PHON: matama nira kunini u ʦʦaj a fawu.
S.FORM: matama nira kunini u ccay a fawu.
S.PHON: matama nira kunini u ʦʦaj a fawu.

TRANSL.notes: 他發現這個一隻蟲(指螃蟹).

S.FORM: ca'ay kafana' cingra tu nika u ma'an ku ngangan nunini a fawu.
S.PHON: ʦaʡaj kafanaʡ ʦiŋra tu nika u maʡan ku ŋaŋan nunini a fawu.
S.FORM: ca'ay kafana' cingra tu nika u ma'an ku ngangan nunini a fawu.
S.PHON: ʦaʡaj kafanaʡ ʦiŋra tu nika u maʡan ku ŋaŋan nunini a fawu.
S.TRANSL: 他不知道這隻蟲的名字是什麼.
He didn't know the name of the insect.

S.FORM: unini sa a suwal aku.
S.PHON: unini sa a suwaɾ aku.
S.FORM: unini sa a suwal aku.
S.PHON: unini sa a suwaɾ aku.

S.FORM: u pakayniay i saka u u kalang han ku kalang nu u kalang han ku ngangan nura.
S.PHON: u pakajniaj i saka u u kaɾaŋ ħan ku kaɾaŋ nu u kaɾaŋ ħan ku ŋaŋan nura.
S.FORM: u pakayniay i saka u u kalang han ku kalang nu u kalang han ku ngangan nura.
S.PHON: u pakajniaj i saka u u kaɾaŋ ħan ku kaɾaŋ nu u kaɾaŋ ħan ku ŋaŋan nura.
S.TRANSL: 我要說有關於螃蟹為什麼叫做「Kalang」.
I want to talk about why crabs are called 'Kalang.'

S.FORM: sanay kunini a sasuwalen aku.
S.PHON: sanaj kunini a sasuwaɾən aku.
S.FORM: sanay kunini a sasuwalen aku.
S.PHON: sanaj kunini a sasuwaɾən aku.
S.TRANSL: This is what I want to talk about.

S.FORM: saka yo talaalo' kiya ccay a matu'asay.
S.PHON: saka jo~u taɾaaɾo~uʡ kija ʦʦaj a matuʡasaj.
S.FORM: saka yo talaalo' kiya ccay a matu'asay.
S.PHON: saka jo~u taɾaaɾo~uʡ kija ʦʦaj a matuʡasaj.
S.TRANSL: An old man went to the river.

S.FORM: mifuhad cingra tu fekeloh.
S.PHON: mifuħaɬ~ɮ ʦiŋra tu fəkəɾo~uħ.
S.FORM: mifuhad cingra tu fekeloh.
S.PHON: mifuħaɬ~ɮ ʦiŋra tu fəkəɾo~uħ.

S.FORM: matama nira ku ccay a fawn.
S.PHON: matama nira ku ʦʦaj a fawn.
S.FORM: matama nira ku ccay a fawn.
S.PHON: matama nira ku ʦʦaj a fawn.

S.FORM: anu u ma'an kurira ca'ay kafana' cingra.
S.PHON: anu u maʡan kurira ʦaʡaj kafanaʡ ʦiŋra.
S.FORM: anu u ma'an kurira ca'ay kafana' cingra.
S.PHON: anu u maʡan kurira ʦaʡaj kafanaʡ ʦiŋra.
S.TRANSL: He didn't know what it was.

S.FORM: mifuhad cingra tuya fekeloh.
S.PHON: mifuħaɬ~ɮ ʦiŋra tuja fəkəɾo~uħ.
S.FORM: mifuhad cingra tuya fekeloh.
S.PHON: mifuħaɬ~ɮ ʦiŋra tuja fəkəɾo~uħ.

S.FORM: ira matama nira ku ccay a fawu.
S.PHON: ira matama nira ku ʦʦaj a fawu.
S.FORM: ira matama nira ku ccay a fawu.
S.PHON: ira matama nira ku ʦʦaj a fawu.

S.FORM: mika mikalat tu kamay nira.
S.PHON: mika mikaɾat tu kamaj nira.
S.FORM: mika mikalat tu kamay nira.
S.PHON: mika mikaɾat tu kamaj nira.

S.FORM: ira ku mitafesiway a ccay a tamdaw u taywan.
S.PHON: ira ku mitafəsiwaj a ʦʦaj a tamɬ~ɮaw u tajwan.
S.FORM: ira ku mitafesiway a ccay a tamdaw u taywan.
S.PHON: ira ku mitafəsiwaj a ʦʦaj a tamɬ~ɮaw u tajwan.

S.FORM: manengneng niya taywan kuya matu'asay tiya mialaan nira makalat ku kamay nira.
S.PHON: manəŋnəŋ nija tajwan kuja matuʡasaj tija miaɾaan nira makaɾat ku kamaj nira.
S.FORM: manengneng niya taywan kuya matu'asay tiya mialaan nira makalat ku kamay nira.
S.PHON: manəŋnəŋ nija tajwan kuja matuʡasaj tija miaɾaan nira makaɾat ku kamaj nira.
S.TRANSL: 那個閩南人看到那個老人他的手被咬了.
The Taiwanese saw the old man. His hand was bitten.

S.FORM: e mik mikalang sa'an kuya taywan tuya suwal tuya fawu.
S.PHON: ə mik mikaɾaŋ saʡan kuja tajwan tuja suwaɾ tuja fawu.
S.FORM: e mik mikalang sa'an kuya taywan tuya suwal tuya fawu.
S.PHON: ə mik mikaɾaŋ saʡan kuja tajwan tuja suwaɾ tuja fawu.

TRANSL.notes: 那個閩南人針對那隻蟲說:「會咬人!(閩南語)」.

S.TRANSL: 那個閩南人針對那隻蟲說:「會咬人! 」.

TRANSL.notes: The Taiwanese said of the insect, "(it) bites."

S.TRANSL: The Taiwanese said of the insect, " bites."

S.FORM: matengil niya matu'asay.
S.PHON: matəŋiɾ nija matuʡasaj.
S.FORM: matengil niya matu'asay.
S.PHON: matəŋiɾ nija matuʡasaj.
S.TRANSL: It was heard by the old man.

S.FORM: a u kalang ku ngangan nuninian sa sa u kalang.
S.PHON: a u kaɾaŋ ku ŋaŋan nuninian sa sa u kaɾaŋ.
S.FORM: a u kalang ku ngangan nuninian sa sa u kalang.
S.PHON: a u kaɾaŋ ku ŋaŋan nuninian sa sa u kaɾaŋ.

S.FORM: hantu nira kura pangangan turira tu tu kalang.
S.PHON: ħantu nira kura paŋaŋan turira tu tu kaɾaŋ.
S.FORM: hantu nira kura pangangan turira tu tu kalang.
S.PHON: ħantu nira kura paŋaŋan turira tu tu kaɾaŋ.

S.FORM: mi mikalat sanay ku taywan kura kalang sa ku taywan.
S.PHON: mi mikaɾat sanaj ku tajwan kura kaɾaŋ sa ku tajwan.
S.FORM: mi mikalat sanay ku taywan kura kalang sa ku taywan.
S.PHON: mi mikaɾat sanaj ku tajwan kura kaɾaŋ sa ku tajwan.

S.FORM: sa haw u kalang hantu nu mita u amis.
S.PHON: sa ħaw u kaɾaŋ ħantu nu mita u amis.
S.FORM: sa haw u kalang hantu nu mita u amis.
S.PHON: sa ħaw u kaɾaŋ ħantu nu mita u amis.
S.TRANSL: 所以我們阿美族稱它作Kalang.
So we Amis call it Kalang.

S.FORM: kunini a pangangan tunini a kalang hatiraay tunini u.
S.PHON: kunini a paŋaŋan tunini a kaɾaŋ ħatiraaj tunini u.
S.FORM: kunini a pangangan tunini a kalang hatiraay tunini u.
S.PHON: kunini a paŋaŋan tunini a kaɾaŋ ħatiraaj tunini u.
S.TRANSL: 這就是為什麼我們叫螃蟹Kalang.
This is why we call crabs Kalang.

S.FORM: sakaira nu kalang sanay a kaka'enen ita u misaAmisay.
S.PHON: sakaira nu kaɾaŋ sanaj a kakaʡənən ita u misaamisaj.
S.FORM: sakaira nu kalang sanay a kaka'enen ita u misaAmisay.
S.PHON: sakaira nu kaɾaŋ sanaj a kakaʡənən ita u misaamisaj.
S.TRANSL: 我們有Kalang這個名稱,是我們阿美族吃的那個.

TRANSL.notes: We use the name 'Kalang' for the (food) that we Amis eat.

S.TRANSL: We use the name 'Kalang' for the that we Amis eat.
